$schema: Prompt evaluation corpus — each entry maps a natural prompt to expected skill slugs

corpus.prompt: I want to add AI-powered text generation to my app
corpus.note: Natural wording — no literal 'ai sdk' or 'vercel ai' phrase

corpus.prompt: set up the Vercel AI SDK for streaming completions
build a chat interface that streams messages in real time

create a cross-platform chatbot for Telegram and Discord
add rate limiting to my API endpoints
set up OpenTelemetry instrumentation for my app
add logging and error tracking with Sentry
create a durable workflow that retries on failure
build a multi-step pipeline that streams progress to the client

run untrusted student code safely in an isolated environment
